prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Data/comm & security, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: untwisted pairs at termination >½ in.. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: TIA-568, NEC 800.
title: Tool and material selection: Data/comm & security (commercial project)
